parameters: \n<Mimi>Hey hey heyyy! Welcome to Mimi's Pet Shop!
I know my customers... this is your first
\n<Mimi>Want one of these cuties all for yourself?
They're so so sooo adorable!! But besides
being cute, pets can help you in a lot
\n<Mimi>This is a pet shop, so you can buy buy buy yourself
a new best friend! This is your lucky day!
Just walk up to 'em... they choose you!
I can manage your pets too!
\n<Mimi>Buy buy buy yourself a new best friend!
Just walk up to 'em... they choose you!
I can manage your pets too!
\n<Mimi>Show me your pet's favorite item, and
we can get get get it from your home!
\n<Mimi>Oh no... looks like you don't have a pet pet pet...
the perfect opportunity to buy one of these cuties!!
Extra line to fix bug with interpreter
You don't have a pet with you.
to your home safe safe safe!
but come on, she's so so so cute!!
\n<Mimi>Aw, it looks like he really really really likes you!
\n<Mimi>That one's Arlo! He was born deaf, but his exceptional
sense of smell grants him the ability to sniff out
nearby treasure! The perfect companion for the
adventurer who wants to find it all all all!
\n<Mimi>Are you interested in giving him a new home?
\n<Mimi>Yippee! He'll be the best best best friend you've ever had!
\n<Mimi>Well, he was bred to be a lapdog, of course he's expensive!
He has that royal blood coursing through him! But if you ever
change your mind, and no one else has picked him up, he'll be
waiting right here for you you you!
\n<Mimi>Aw, that's Jackson... he's an old boy. I can
barely even take him for walks anymore. It's
sad sad sad when they age...
\n<Mimi>Haha, he's always trying to grab someone's food!
Didn't you see him staring at that empty bowl!
I literally just fed fed fed him...
\n<Mimi>That one's Duncan! He's a hungry lil' guy,
but he knows a thing or two about good food!
Just having him around will make all the
food you eat a lot lot lot better for you!
\n<Mimi>Are you interested in giving him a new home?
\n<Mimi>Yippee! Make sure you watch what he eats eats eats!
\n<Mimi>Yeah, but good hamsters are expensive! You don't
want to pay for one with some disease disease disease,
right? He's healthy as can be, and sure to live a long
life, so you won't lose your moeny money money!
\n<Mimi>That's Ol' Jimbo, he's been with me for a long time.
No one ever wanted him because he looks like a rat. Can you
see see see it? I don't know how much longer he has left...
\n<Mimi>Clover's domesticated, but she certainly has that wild instinct
within her. Likes to hunt hunt hunt! Take her along with you,
and she'll help you get the advantage against enemies,
granting a free turn at the start of battle!
\n<Mimi>Are you interested in giving her a new home?
\n<Mimi>Yippee! She can mostly take care of herself, just make
sure to play play play with her now and then!
\n<Mimi>Well, Clover's the last of a long breed of hunting cats! A strange
experiment started by a Tellurian noble a hundred years ago...
dogs proved to be much much much better, so the project was
abandoned. But Clover still has that killer instinct!
Jeez, no need to react like that...
Jeez, no need to react like that...
\n<Mimi>Oh, that's silly lil' Mooch! You know how
those orange cats are... he's been tearing
up the place lately, so I can't sell him
until he quits quits quits that habit.
\knightMimi insists on having a pet delivery/retrieval service,
and the only organization capable of a worldwide operation
like that is the Tellurian military. Our hiring costs are
absurd, she's going to go out of business at this rate...
